# TiledStyleDefinition.TypeTag property

The polymorphic-variant tag at +0x50. `0xBC0D579E` is the most-common variant observed (7 of 8 dumped records); `0x02E46583` appears on at least one record ([`SnoId`](./SnoId.md) 603760 BagBackground). The exact variant name for each tag is a future-cracked TypeHash.
